avatar: Handmade and craft Etsy sellers who've made a handful of sales but have mostly-silent shops. Usually solo, creative rather than technical, easily overwhelmed by "marketing," and short on time because they're the one making the product. They don't want to become marketers — they just want their existing listings to work.
main_problem: Their listings are invisible. They pour hours into their products and photos, but their titles, tags, and descriptions aren't written the way Etsy's search actually reads them — so buyers never see them. They blame the algorithm, drop their prices, or quietly give up.
main_promise: Within a weekend, they can rewrite their top listings so they start showing up in Etsy search and converting browsers into buyers — using a repeatable formula, not guesswork. The goal being sold: their first "where did this sale come from?!" moment from a listing they fixed.
core_product_type: Plug-and-play digital mini-kit (do-it-with-me framework, checklist, and worksheet)
core_deliverables: The Listing Formula — a fill-in-the-blank framework for titles, tags, and descriptions that matches how Etsy search ranks listings
The 15-Minute Listing Audit — a checklist to run on any existing listing to find exactly what's killing its visibility
The Keyword Grab worksheet — a way to find the search terms real buyers type, without paid tools
bonus_deliverables: 50 High-Converting Title Templates — swipeable title structures for common product types, removes the "I don't know what to write" objection
The Photo Order Cheat Sheet — the ideal order to arrange listing photos so the first image earns the click
order_bump: $9 "Tag Vault" — a categorized bank of 300+ proven Etsy tags they can copy straight into listings
future_upsells: Monthly membership with seasonal keyword drops
buyer_objections: "I'm not techy / I don't get SEO." (The whole thing is fill-in-the-blank, no jargon.)
"I don't have time." (Designed for one weekend, one listing at a time.)
"I've tried tips before and nothing changed." (This is a repeatable formula, not random tips.)
"Will this work for MY niche?" (The formula is niche-agnostic; templates cover common types.)
roi_logic: Priced at $29. One extra sale a week from a single fixed listing pays for it many times over, and most sellers have dozens of listings to apply it to.
tone: Warm, encouraging, plain-English. Talk to them like a fellow maker who figured this out, not a marketing guru. No hype.
ethical_boundaries: No income promises — no guaranteed sales, since results depend on their products and effort. Can only promise the framework and that they'll have rewritten, search-ready listings by the end. Keep all claims grounded; no fake scarcity.
delivery_format: Instant digital delivery: a Google Drive folder with PDFs and the fill-in worksheets, plus a short welcome video. Access emailed automatically right after purchase.
